esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Direct error count from the engine
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errors = SUM(metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE total_errors > 0
| KEEP instance_id, total_errors
